General.Name: Facephi Biometria S.A.
General.Description: Facephi Biometria, S.A. engages in the biometric facial recognition technology solutions in Spain and internationally. Its products include digital identity platform, a multibiometric solution that allows the customer to design any digital onboarding and authentication process; digital onboarding, a software solution that enables automatic document capture, and remote user onboarding and authentication; and authentication, a solution that allows user identity verification through biometric technology. The company provides its solutions under FacePhi Beyond Biometrics, SelphID, Selphi, Look&Phi, PhiVox, inPhinite, and SignPhi brands. Its solutions are used in financial services, online gambling and gaming, aviation, crypto, telco, hospitality, public administration, health, insurance, legal sector, e-commerce, e-learning, and shared economy industries, as well as sport events. It has strategic alliance with huenei to strengthen digital identity solutions. Facephi Biometria, S.A. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Alicante, Spain.
